g.text: Databricks Apps + LangGraph + Model Serving Endpoint + AI Search + Workflows
RAG Knowledge Base (Unity Catalog + AI Search)
Structured Platform Data (Unity Catalog -- Delta Tables)
Genie is read-only; we need full WRITE capability.
Stateful A2A via shared LangGraph state + Delta tables.
- Databricks logs are a first-class KB source
- Pipeline failure vs data anomaly = 2 signal types
- Async D1/D2/D3: Delta tables + Workflow triggers
- Phase 1: REST adapters in tool layer
- Phase 2: MCP gateway if standardization needed
- Full conversational DQ copilot on Databricks Apps
- RAG retrieval from docs + logs + incidents
- Pipeline failure + data anomaly unified diagnosis
Jira ticket / GitHub PR / restart job
